provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female ship engineer in her late 20s with dark hair tied back and reactor coolant residue staining her hands and forearms, wearing oil-stained khaki shipboard coveralls with a faded vessel registry number stenciled across the back, the coveralls unzipped to the waist with the top half tied around her hips by the sleeves revealing a grey thermal compression undershirt, a leather tool roll slung across her chest containing plasma cutter tips and circuit probes, welding visor pushed up on her forehead, heavy insulated deck boots rated for hull work, burn marks on the cuff from arc welding
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Coveralls in engine room. Similar to v1 but warmer tones.
